description: A self-hosted web file manager forked from FileBrowser with advanced features including OIDC authentication, indexed search, office document previews, and multi-source support.
author: BigBearCommunity

tips.before_install:
**Support BigBearTechWorld**: https://ko-fi.com/bigbeartechworld
**Community Forum**: https://community.bigbeartechworld.com/t/added-filebrowser-quantum-to-bigbearuniversal-apps/5209?u=dragonfire1119

Default credentials are **admin / admin**. Please change the password after your first login.

title: FileBrowser Quantum
